headline: Rockwell Automation to Present at Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference
summary: MILWAUKEE, May 28, 2026--Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) SVP, Software & Control, Matheus Bulho, and VP, Investor Relations and Market Strategy, Aijana Zellner, will present at the 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference on Thursday, June 11, in Chicago.
